change: Initial skill — prune noise comments (restated code, duplicates, stale/filler) while keeping why/invariant/gotcha/far-pointer comments; calibrate to per-file density; list-then-apply with a test gate.
Bias one notch leaner: default disposition is remove, borderline comments get cut, keep-bar raised, calibration trims below file density.
snag: blunt deletion bias = unintelligent chopping; reverted

change: Reverted the deletion bias. Cleanup is per-comment judgment (signal vs noise); leanness is a byproduct of precision, not a quota; over-pruning real context stated as the worse failure.
Added a second lens: long blocks aren't auto-safe. Trim self-repetition + cross-comment redundancy (one canonical home + far-pointers), verify stale pointers.
snag: v1.2 only hunted restated-code noise; beefy load-bearing-but-bloated blocks got a free pass
